title: ttsMP3.com_VoiceText_2026-4-24_23-52-1
transcript: We discussed the new dashboard feature. The team agreed to prioritize performance improvements. Alex will optimize database queries by Thursday. For year we'll redesign the UI components. We will launch the update next week.
summary: The team discussed the new dashboard feature and prioritized performance improvements. They agreed to optimize database queries by Alex and redesign the UI components for the upcoming year, with a planned launch next week.
